en: It is actually reported that there is sexual immorality among you, and of a kind that is not tolerated even among pagans, for a man has his father's wife.
zh: 聽說你們中間竟然有淫亂的事，這樣的淫亂在教外人中間都沒有，就是有人和他的繼母同居。

en: And you are arrogant! Ought you not rather to mourn? Let him who has done this be removed from among you.
zh: 你們還是自高自大！難道你們不該覺得痛心，把作這件事的人從你們中間趕出去嗎？

en: For though absent in body, I am present in spirit; and as if present, I have already pronounced judgment on the one who did such a thing.
zh: 我身體雖然不在你們那裡，心靈卻與你們在一起，好像我親身在那裡審判了作這件事的人，

en: When you are assembled in the name of the Lord Jesus and my spirit is present, with the power of our Lord Jesus,
zh: 就是當你們奉我們主耶穌的名聚集在一起，我的靈在那裡，我們主耶穌的權能也同在的時候，

en: you are to deliver this man to Satan for the destruction of the flesh, so that his spirit may be saved in the day of the Lord.
zh: 要把這樣的人交給撒但，敗壞他的身體，使他的靈魂在主的日子可以得救。

en: Your boasting is not good. Do you not know that a little leaven leavens the whole lump?
zh: 你們這樣自誇是不好的。你們不知道一點麵酵能使全團麵發起來嗎？

en: Cleanse out the old leaven that you may be a new lump, as you really are unleavened. For Christ, our Passover lamb, has been sacrificed.
zh: 你們既是無酵的麵，就應當把舊酵除淨，好讓你們成為新的麵團；因為我們逾越節的羊羔基督已經被殺獻祭了。

en: Let us therefore celebrate the festival, not with the old leaven, the leaven of malice and evil, but with the unleavened bread of sincerity and truth.
zh: 所以我們守這節，不可用舊酵，也不可用又邪又惡的酵，而是要用純潔真實的無酵餅。

en: I wrote to you in my letter not to associate with sexually immoral people-
zh: 我以前寫信告訴你們，不可與淫亂的人來往。

en: not at all meaning the sexually immoral of this world, or the greedy and swindlers, or idolaters, since then you would need to go out of the world.
zh: 這話當然不是指這世上行淫亂的、貪心的、勒索的，或拜偶像的人；如果是這樣，你們就非脫離這世界不可。

en: But now I am writing to you not to associate with anyone who bears the name of brother if he is guilty of sexual immorality or greed, or is an idolater, reviler, drunkard, or swindler- not even to eat with such a one.
zh: 但現在我寫信告訴你們，如果有稱為弟兄，卻是行淫亂、貪心、拜偶像、辱罵人、醉酒或勒索的，這樣的人，不可和他來往，連和他吃飯都不可。

en: For what have I to do with judging outsiders? Is it not those inside the church whom you are to judge?
zh: 審判教外的人，跟我有甚麼關係？教內的人不是你們審判的嗎？

en: God judges those outside. "Purge the evil person from among you."
zh: 至於教外的人， 神會審判他們。你們要把那惡人從你們中間趕出去。
